turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking a Table at a Restaurant

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi… I want to book a table.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, no problem at all. I can help you with that. First, how many people will be coming to the restaurant?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Two people.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, a table for two. And what time were you hoping to come in today? If you’re flexible, I can also let you know what times are available.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Um… when can I get time? Sorry, I mean what time is available?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s okay. Let me check for you. We currently have tables available at  this evening, or at . Both times are fine, so just let me know which one works better for you.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want… having table at 7 p.m. Sorry, I want to have a table at 7.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem at all. I’ll book the table for 7 p.m. Now, would you prefer to sit inside the restaurant, or would you like to sit outside if the weather is nice?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Inside. Near the window, please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, outside near the window.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Uh… sorry, not outside. Inside. Window seat inside.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Ah, I see. Thanks for letting me know. Inside the restaurant, near the window. I’ll make sure to note that request for you.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Is this booking for a special occasion, like a birthday or celebration, or is it just a regular meal?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes… it is my husband birthday.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s lovely. We’re happy to help celebrate. We can add a candle to the dessert if you’d like, and there’s no problem arranging that. Would you like us to do that for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please. Is extra money? Sorry… is there extra fee?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No, there’s no extra charge for that at all. We’re happy to include it.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, good. Also… we bring our own cake. Is it okay?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s absolutely fine. Just let our staff know when you arrive, and they’ll help you with it.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Um… do you have vegetarian menu? Sorry, vegetarian option?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we do. We have several vegetarian options available on the menu, so there should be a few choices to pick from.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, thank you.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, before I finish the booking, let me just quickly confirm the details with you so everything is correct. I have a table for two people booked for today at 7 p.m., inside the restaurant, near the window.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Sorry, can you say again time and seat?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Your table is booked for 7 p.m. this evening, inside the restaurant, by the window.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, that’s right.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. Your booking is all set. We look forward to welcoming you later today.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Thank you so much. フォームの終わり
